# Version 4.150.1
> **Upstream bug-fix servicing** · Released July 14, 2026 · [NuGet](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/4.150.1) · [GitHub Release](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/releases/tag/v4.150.1)

> **API changes** · [SkiaSharp API diff](4.150.1/index.md) · [HarfBuzzSharp API diff](harfbuzzsharp/14.2.1.1/index.md)

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 4.150.1 is a servicing release with two rounds of upstream Skia m150 bug fixes.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this release.*

## Engine

- **Two rounds of chrome/m150 upstream bug fixes** — Two upstream bug-fix syncs from the chrome/m150 branch have been applied, pulling in stability and correctness improvements from the Skia team. ([#4379](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4379), [#4429](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4429))

## HarfBuzzSharp 14.2.1.1

No HarfBuzzSharp binding changes shipped in this release — it rebuilds the same HarfBuzz as the previous line.
